top.headline: Trump's Iran war speech paints a grim picture for oil markets with more than 600 million barrels at risk
top.summary: Oil prices are surging as the market prepares for a longer U.S. war with Iran after President Donald Trump's national address.

top.headline: U.S. oil prices soar 11% as Trump's Iran war speech stokes fears of further escalation
top.summary: Oil surged as Trump in his address to the nation on Iran war said that he expected the conflict to last another two to three weeks.

top.headline: Faced with new energy shock, Europe asks if reviving nuclear is the answer
top.summary: As war drives up gas and fuel prices, Europeans turn again to the issue of energy independence.

top.headline: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
top.summary: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

top.headline: 'This has got me worried': Iranians fear what comes next after US strike on Karaj bridge
top.summary: President Trump has warned Iran of strikes on bridges and electric power plants if its leaders do not agree to his terms to end the war.

top.headline: When will the Iran war end? Tracing the Trump administration's timelines
top.summary: Experts say many US presidents have offered a timeline for a conflict - only to then shift their estimates.

top.headline: Buffett vende Apple troppo presto
top.summary: Warren Buffett afferma di aver venduto Apple troppo presto e acquisterebbe ancora, sebbene non in questo mercato. Apple rimane la partecipazione più grande di Berkshire Hathaway.

top.headline: Prezzi commodity in aumento
top.summary: L'aumento dei prezzi di alcune commodity chiave utilizzate nella difesa e nei semiconduttori per l'intelligenza artificiale riflette la presa della Cina sulle catene di approvvigionamento. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sugli ETF del settore tecnologico e delle commodity.

top.headline: Iran minaccia giganti tech
top.summary: La Guardia Rivoluzionaria dell'Iran ha avvertito diverse aziende tech con operazioni in Medio Oriente di essere considerate "bersagli legittimi". Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto negativo sui settori tech e del mercato più ampio.

top.headline: Irlanda dipende dal farmaco
top.summary: L'Irlanda è diventata il terzo maggiore esportatore di farmaci al mondo, con i medicinali che rappresentano circa il 20% del PIL irlandese. La forte dipendenza dell'Irlanda dall'industria farmaceutica potrebbe essere a rischio a causa di dazi, scadenze di brevetti e tensioni geopolitiche.

top.headline: Piero Cipollone: The digital euro in a fragmenting world: ensuring Europe’s resilience and autonomy in payments
top.summary: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency.

top.headline: Eurosystem sets out comprehensive strategy for future of European payments
top.summary: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency.

top.headline: Powell: inflazione sotto controllo
top.summary: Il presidente della Fed, Jerome Powell, ritiene che l'inflazione sia sotto controllo e non ci sia bisogno di aumentare i tassi di interesse a causa dello shock petrolifero. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto positivo sui mercati.

top.headline: Watch: Trump's shifting deadlines for ending Iran war
top.summary: The BBC's chief international correspondent analyses the US President's latest White House address.

top.headline: Ros Atkins on…the cost of the Iran war
top.summary: The BBC's Analysis Editor Ros Atkins takes a closer look at US costs as it continues its war with with Iran.

top.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 36 of US-Israeli attacks?
top.summary: Iran claims responsibility for downing two US warplanes, as search under way for missing crewmember.

top.headline: Will force be used to reopen Strait of Hormuz?
top.summary: Some countries threaten action against Iran's blockade of waterway.

top.headline: Iranian missile attack hits residential areas in central Israel
top.summary: An Iranian missile attack has caused damage across residential areas in central Israel, according to Israeli media.

top.headline: Iran war live: Tehran downs 2 US warplanes; Israel bombs Lebanon bridges
top.summary: Celebrations in Tehran as Iran's military says the strikes show its forces still have fighting capability.

top.headline: Trump minaccia l'Iran
top.summary: La minaccia di Trump potrebbe aumentare la volatilità del mercato energetico e avere un impatto sulla stabilità globale. Ciò potrebbe influenzare gli ETF legati all'energia e al mercato azionario.

top.headline: Christians in Lebanon observe Good Friday under Israeli attacks
top.summary: Christians across Lebanon observed Good Friday, praying for peace as Israeli strikes and evacuation orders continue.

top.headline: Survivors of Iran bridge attack recall terror of US-Israeli strike
top.summary: Survivors of an Israeli-US attack on Iran’s biggest road bridge have spoken of their terror as missiles hit it.

top.headline: More than 20 attacks on Iranian healthcare facilities since March 1: WHO
top.summary: WHO chief Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus says 'multiple attacks' on Iranian healthcare facilities have been reported.

top.headline: Prezzi gas non influenzano Fed
top.summary: I prezzi del gas non dovrebbero influenzare le decisioni della Fed sui tassi di interesse e potrebbero addirittura portare a tagli. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto positivo sui settori energetico e finanziario.

top.headline: Fed: tassi di interesse potrebbero scendere
top.summary: Il governatore della Fed Stephen Miran sostiene che i tassi di interesse potrebbero essere più bassi quest'anno, influenzando i settori finanziari e il mercato azionario. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sugli ETF di settore.

top.headline: Timori inflazione
top.summary: I dati sui lavori e la guerra in Iran aumentano i timori di inflazione per i titoli di Stato USA. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto sui mercati azionari.

top.headline: Vincitori nascosti nel settore chip
top.summary: La crescente domanda di satelliti porterà a un aumento della richiesta di semiconduttori. Ciò potrebbe favorire aziende meno conosciute del settore.

top.headline: Oro cinese attraente
top.summary: Gli analisti ritengono che questo titolo abbia ancora spazio per crescere nonostante la recente volatilità dei prezzi dell'oro.

top.headline: Effetti delle tariffe Trump
top.summary: Le tariffe di Trump continuano ad avere un impatto sulle industrie come retail e auto. Le aziende stanno rivedendo i loro modelli di rischio economico e politico.

articles.title: What in the World?

articles.title: Will the Iran War Evaporate the Gulf’s AI Oasis?
articles.summary_en: The Iran war has punctured—though not completely popped—the region’s tech bubble.

articles.title: How the Iran War Became NATO’s Biggest Crisis
articles.summary_en: President Donald Trump told Reuters on Wednesday that he is considering withdrawing the United States from the 76-year-old alliance after European allies declined to send warships to reopen the Strait of Hormuz to global shipping. "Wouldn't you if you were me?" he asked. Earlier this week, in an interview with Britain's The Telegraph, he called NATO a "paper tiger" and said Russian President Vladimir Putin shared the assessment. The spat has a straightforward trigger. The Strait of Hormuz, the narrow chokepoint between Iran and Oman through which…

articles.title: Trump Says US Could ‘Take the Oil’ in Hormuz Push
articles.summary_en: President Donald Trump said Friday the United States could reopen the Strait of Hormuz and “take the oil and make a fortune,” framing control of the world’s most critical energy chokepoint as both a strategic and economic opportunity. The Strait carries roughly 20% of global oil supply. Traffic through the waterway has been severely disrupted as Iranian threats, vessel attacks, and collapsing insurance coverage have curtailed tanker movements. Tanker flows have stalled, and crude and product markets have repriced sharply higher…

articles.title: BP’s New CEO Faces a Defining Test as War Boosts Profits
articles.summary_en: In one sense it’s a baptism of fire – in another, hardly at all. Meg O’Neill’s arrival as the first female chief executive of BP comes, in a sense, at an auspicious moment.  Oil majors’ earnings are set for a significant windfall from the conflict in Iran, with those of BP and Shell forecast to see a combined £5bn this year – and that’s if the war is limited in timeframe. That cannot mask, though, the scale of the task facing O’Neill, who arrives from Australia’s Woodside Petroleum…

articles.title: First Western European Vessel Transits Hormuz Since War Began
articles.summary_en: A container ship owned by French shipping giant CMA CGM, has just transited the Strait of Hormuz in what appears to be the first vessel linked to Western Europe to have successfully braved the critical chokepoint since the war in the Middle East began. The Malta-flagged CMA CGM Kribi, which openly broadcasts its French ownership, transited the Strait of Hormuz between Thursday afternoon and Friday morning, according to vessel-tracking data monitored by Bloomberg. Data on MarineTraffic showed that CMA CGM Kribi was in the Oman Gulf as of 12 p.m.…

articles.title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock
articles.summary_it: Il presidente della Fed, Jerome Powell, ritiene che l'inflazione sia sotto controllo e non ci sia bisogno di aumentare i tassi di interesse a causa dello shock petrolifero. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto positivo sui mercati.
articles.summary_en: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell spoke Monday at Harvard University.

articles.title: Iran and Oman drafting protocol to 'monitor' Hormuz Strait traffic: IRNA
articles.headline_it: Iran e Oman controllano stretto di Hormuz
articles.summary_it: La chiusura dello stretto di Hormuz ha un impatto significativo sulle forniture di petrolio a livello globale, influenzando i settori energetico e delle commodity. Ciò potrebbe avere ripercussioni sui prezzi del petrolio e sui mercati finanziari.
articles.summary_en: The Strait of Hormuz, the vital artery for global oil transit, has been effectively closed since the Iran war started in late February.

articles.title: Why $4 a gallon gas prices won’t trigger Fed interest rate hikes — and could lead to cuts
articles.summary_it: I prezzi del gas non dovrebbero influenzare le decisioni della Fed sui tassi di interesse e potrebbero addirittura portare a tagli. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto positivo sui settori energetico e finanziario.
articles.summary_en: While there's still plenty of uncertainty about where rates are headed, Wall Street commentary shifted back to expectations for cuts.

articles.title: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
articles.summary_it: La chiusura dello Stretto di Hormuz a causa della guerra con l'Iran sta causando problemi di approvvigionamento per i produttori cinesi, con possibili aumenti dei prezzi per gli americani. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sui settori energetico e del mercato azionario.
articles.summary_en: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.

articles.title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
articles.summary_it: L'aumento degli stati con armi nucleari altera il panorama dei rischi globali. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sui mercati energetici e azionari.
articles.summary_en: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.

articles.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
articles.summary_it: Warren Buffett afferma di aver venduto Apple troppo presto e acquisterebbe ancora, sebbene non in questo mercato. Apple rimane la partecipazione più grande di Berkshire Hathaway.
articles.summary_en: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.

articles.title: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
articles.summary_it: L'aumento dei prezzi di alcune commodity chiave utilizzate nella difesa e nei semiconduttori per l'intelligenza artificiale riflette la presa della Cina sulle catene di approvvigionamento. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sugli ETF del settore tecnologico e delle commodity.
articles.summary_en: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.

articles.title: Fed Governor Miran still backs cuts, says interest rates could be 'about a point' lower this year
articles.headline_it: Fed: tassi di interesse potrebbero scendere
articles.summary_it: Il governatore della Fed Stephen Miran sostiene che i tassi di interesse potrebbero essere più bassi quest'anno, influenzando i settori finanziari e il mercato azionario. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sugli ETF di settore.
articles.summary_en: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran spoke Monday on CNBC's "Squawk on the Street."

articles.title: Jobs data, Iran war add to inflation fears for retirees
articles.summary_it: I dati sui lavori e la guerra in Iran aumentano i timori di inflazione per i titoli di Stato USA. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto sui mercati azionari.
articles.summary_en: The U.S. Treasury bond market is getting increasingly worried about inflation.

articles.title: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
articles.summary_it: La minaccia di Trump potrebbe aumentare la volatilità del mercato energetico e avere un impatto sulla stabilità globale. Ciò potrebbe influenzare gli ETF legati all'energia e al mercato azionario.
articles.summary_en: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

articles.title: How Iran turned a tiny island into an oil 'toll booth' as Tehran cements grip on global energy flows
articles.summary_it: L'Iran ha creato un corridoio di navigazione sicuro nel nord dello Stretto di Hormuz per selezionare navi, aumentando il controllo sui flussi energetici globali. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto significativo sul settore energetico.
articles.summary_en: Iran has established a de facto safe shipping corridor in the north of the Strait of Hormuz to select ships, as Tehran sought to monetize its grip over the waterway.

articles.title: Analysis: Trump's Iran speech ignores the risks of a return to the 1970s
articles.summary_it: Gli shock petroliferi hanno messo in crisi passate presidenze. La guerra in Iran potrebbe mettere Trump nella zona pericolosa. L'impatto potrebbe essere significativo per il settore energetico.
articles.summary_en: Oil shocks crippled past presidencies. The Iran war is putting Trump into the danger zone.

articles.title: Iran threatens Nvidia, Apple and other tech giants with attacks
articles.summary_it: La Guardia Rivoluzionaria dell'Iran ha avvertito diverse aziende tech con operazioni in Medio Oriente di essere considerate "bersagli legittimi". Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto negativo sui settori tech e del mercato più ampio.
articles.summary_en: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has warned a number of tech companies with Middle East operations that they'll be considered "legitimate targets."

articles.title: Dow closes lower as Trump comments dampen traders’ hopes for Iran war ending: Live updates
articles.summary_it: Il Dow Industrials ha chiuso leggermente in basso a causa delle preoccupazioni sulla guerra con l'Iran. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto negativo sui mercati finanziari.
articles.summary_en: The Dow Industrials ended Thursday slightly lower as traders weighed the prospect of the Iran war continuing for weeks.

articles.title: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
articles.summary_it: Blue Owl ha limitato i rimborsi dei fondi di credito privato al 5% a causa di richieste elevate, attribuite a preoccupazioni sul mercato legate alla disruption dell'AI nel settore software.
articles.summary_en: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."

articles.title: This Chinese gold play is attractive even as the metal sees big price swings, analysts say
articles.summary_it: Gli analisti ritengono che questo titolo abbia ancora spazio per crescere nonostante la recente volatilità dei prezzi dell'oro.
articles.summary_en: This stock still has room to run, the analysts predict, despite recent volatility in gold prices.

articles.title: (BOJ Review) The Concept and Measurement of Underlying Inflation
articles.summary_it: La Banca del Giappone revisiona il concetto e la misurazione dell'inflazione di base, potenziale impatto sui tassi e sui bond.

articles.title: These little-known chip stocks could be winners as SpaceX and Amazon make big satellite pushes
articles.summary_it: La crescente domanda di satelliti porterà a un aumento della richiesta di semiconduttori. Ciò potrebbe favorire aziende meno conosciute del settore.
articles.summary_en: As tens of thousands of satellites are launched into orbit over the next several years, operators will need to buy a lot of semiconductors.

articles.title: Asian travelers seek respite in other options as Middle East travel plans stay grounded
articles.summary_it: I prezzi dei biglietti aerei in Asia aumentano a causa delle tensioni tra Iran e gli Stati Uniti, i viaggiatori asiatici cercano alternative. Ciò potrebbe influenzare i settori energetico e internazionale.
articles.summary_en: Ticket prices across airlines in Asia increase in the midst of Iran War tensions, Asian travelers look elsewhere to relax

articles.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
articles.summary_it: Le tariffe di Trump continuano ad avere un impatto sulle industrie come retail e auto. Le aziende stanno rivedendo i loro modelli di rischio economico e politico.
articles.summary_en: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

articles.title: How Ireland became dependent on big pharma — and the risks ahead
articles.summary_it: L'Irlanda è diventata il terzo maggiore esportatore di farmaci al mondo, con i medicinali che rappresentano circa il 20% del PIL irlandese. La forte dipendenza dell'Irlanda dall'industria farmaceutica potrebbe essere a rischio a causa di dazi, scadenze di brevetti e tensioni geopolitiche.
articles.summary_en: In just 50 years, Ireland has become the world’s third largest exporter of pharmaceuticals, with medicines now making up about 20% of Ireland’s GDP. So how did Ireland become so tied to the pharma industry — and is that reliance at risk amid tariffs, patent cliffs and geopolitical tension?

articles.title: (Research Paper) IMES DPS: Revisiting Shadow Short-term Interest Rate Models: Evidence from the Ultra-Low Interest Rate Environment in Japan
articles.headline_it: Tassi a breve termine in Giappone
articles.summary_it: La Bank of Japan pubblica uno studio sui modelli di tassi a breve termine in un ambiente di tassi ultra-bassi. L'impatto potrebbe essere limitato per gli ETF del settore finanziario e dei bond.

articles.title: South Korea, France agree to deepen defense cooperation amid Middle East conflict
articles.summary_it: La Corea del Sud e la Francia hanno concordato di rafforzare la cooperazione nella difesa. Ciò potrebbe avere un impatto sul settore industriale e sugli ETF internazionali.
articles.summary_en: French officials have said the trip aims to strengthen France's strategic and economic role in the region at a time of "strong international and regional tensions."

articles.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of United Bank
articles.summary_it: La Federal Reserve Board ha emesso un'azione di enforcement contro un ex dipendente di United Bank, senza impatto significativo sul settore finanziario.
articles.summary_en: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of United Bank

articles.title: Warren Buffett teams up with NBA superstar Stephen Curry for charity lunch, reviving iconic auction
articles.summary_it: L'asta di beneficenza di Warren Buffett, con la partecipazione di Stephen Curry, non avrà un impatto diretto sul mercato. L'evento è più una notizia di interesse generale che un evento finanziario rilevante.
articles.summary_en: The winning bidder — along with up to seven guests — will join Buffett and the Currys for an exclusive lunch in Omaha, Nebraska.
